headline: Raymond James Cuts MercadoLibre (MELI) Price Target, Stays Bullish
summary: MercadoLibre, Inc. (NASDAQ:MELI) is one of the 10 Best Aggressive Growth Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On May 8, Raymond James reduced its price target on MercadoLibre, Inc. (NASDAQ:MELI) from $2,250 to $2,000 while keeping a Strong Buy rating on the stock. The research firm said the lower price target is based […]
